creator: mail@henningkessler.de
text:
I did a bit more examination of the problem and I found in /var/log/messages on the host system (TrueNAS Core 13.0-U6.1 (13.1-RELEASE-p9)  entries while restarting the jail (13.3p3) containing 

Jul 10 10:44:09 nas kernel: pid 19344 (daemon), jid 14, uid XXX: exited on signal 12

Cloud it be that there are some errors resulting from the differences from the FreeBSD versions between host and jail?
